acceptance_criteria.text: Product-level Agents builder replaces technical-first creation flow.
proof: AgentBuilderPanel with explicit scenarios and wizard fields
Data source inputs are available during creation
JSON stays collapsed under technical journal
gaps: Authenticated browser smoke still requires logged-in session

acceptance_criteria.text: Document agent works through setup, sources, run artifacts, approval, and feedback version draft.
proof: Explicit category is accepted by draft builder/API
feedback endpoint/version draft coverage remains in route and guardrail tests
gaps: Binary PDF/DOCX/XLSX deep extraction is not part of v1

proof: No direct dispatcher call from blueprint runtime

known_gaps: Authenticated browser smoke still needs a real logged-in session or explicit test credentials.
Generic document v1 handles pasted/text-readable content; deeper binary document parsing remains separate.
